$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostId').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('hostId').val() === auth.uid))

gameState..validate: newData.isString() && (newData.val() === 'lobby' || newData.val() === 'voting' || newData.val() === 'playing' || newData.val() === 'meeting' || newData.val() === 'crew_win' || newData.val() === 'imposter_win' || newData.val() === 'insufficient')

$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['alive', 'name', 'role', 'status', 'uid']) && newData.child('uid').isString() && newData.child('uid').val() === $uid && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length > 0 && newData.child('name').val().length <= 30 && newData.child('status').isString() && newData.child('role').isString() && (newData.child('role').val() === 'Player' || newData.child('role').val() === 'Imposter'))

$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid).exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/alive').val() !== false && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/gameState').val() === 'voting' && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/topics/' + newData.val()).exists()

auth != null && auth.uid === $uid && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid).exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/alive').val() !== false && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/gameState').val() === 'meeting' && (newData.val() === 'skip' || root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + newData.val() + '/alive').val() === true)

$messageId..write: auth != null && !data.exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid).exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/alive').val() !== false && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/codeRunPending').val() !== true
$messageId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['createdAt', 'name', 'text', 'uid']) && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length > 0 && newData.child('text').val().length <= 500

codestate..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/hostId').val() === auth.uid || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid).exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/alive').val() !== false))

$taskId..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/hostId').val() === auth.uid || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid).exists() && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + auth.uid + '/alive').val() !== false))
